title: Les Pardaillan — Tome 03 : La Fausta
summaries: "Les Pardaillan — Tome 03 : La Fausta" by Michel Zévaco is a historical adventure novel serialized between 1902 and 1918. This third volume continues the epic struggle between the heroic swordsman Pardaillan and the beautiful, dangerous Princess Fausta, a descendant of the Borgias. Set during France's religious wars, their passionate conflict shapes the fate of Europe as love and hatred intertwine. Fausta represents dictatorial power while Pardaillan fights for freedom and choice in a world of shifting allegiances and deadly intrigue. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
